name: IF YOU REQUIRE
department: Do You Need To Register A Motor Vehicle With The Ct Of Motor Vehicles (dmv), And You Have Back Taxes? You Must To Pay In Person At The Tax Collector’s With Cash, Bank Check, Cashier’s Check And/or Money Order. At The Close Of Business On The Day Of Said Payment, An Electronic Release Of The Hold For Delinquent Taxes Will Be Sent To Dmv, For Your Registration Purposes. Normally, Dmv Will Allow You To Register The Next Business Day. Note : If You Pay With A Check Or Pay Online, There Will Be An Automatic Ten (10) Business Day Hold.

name: Cameron Natusch
department: Administrator Of Land Use/ Zoning Enforcement Officer:
address: Contact Information Administrator of Land Use/ Zoning Enforcement Officer: Spencer Musselman musselman@watertownct.org Assistant Zoning Enforcement & Wetlands Officer: Cameron Natusch natusch@watertownct.org Administrative Assistant: Carol Allen allen@watertownct.org Secretary: Almira Donorfio donorfio@watertownct.org General Information All applications are non refundable. The department has responsibility for municipal land use functions in the Town including those in the following areas: Planning and Zoning including Zoning Board of Appeals, Conservation of Open Space, Inland Wetlands and Watercourses, Building Services, the Historic District, Flood Prone Areas, and Aquifer Protection Areas. The Land Use Office provides staff services to the public and to the Planning and Zoning Commission, the Conservation/Inland Wetlands Agency, Zoning Board of Appeals, and the Historic District Commission. Staff is available to assist customers in completing a successful application process. Our administrative review team will meet with you to provide assistance every step of the way. We encourage pre-application conferences and will coordinate with the appropriate departments as needed.
